summary:
PANDEMIC WARNINGS AND POLITICAL AGENDAS: Brandon discusses a television appearance where Bill Gates predicted a severe future pandemic occurring within the next four years. Brandon connects this prediction to an Antichrist agenda designed to derail the presidency of Donald Trump and disrupt divine plans. Brandon states that believers should not operate in fear, citing biblical protections like Psalm 91 and Psalm 23.

DIVINE SHAKING AND SPIRITUAL AWAKENING: Brandon shares prophetic insights regarding a major storm approaching the East Coast and originating in Europe. He details a message from God about a forthcoming shaking to awaken the church, which he states will surpass a standard revival and lead to a profound spiritual awakening. Brandon urges the church to rise in authority, anticipating a glorious outpouring of the Holy Spirit and a bride without spot or wrinkle, while rejecting a mindset of panic amidst global crises.

NOW-FAITH AND EXPIRATION DATES ON TRIALS: Brandon recounts receiving a message from God regarding his daughter Megan's healing, instructing him to shift from hoping for a future manifestation to exercising immediate faith. He teaches that every trial, whether related to finances, debt, or marital issues, has a definitive expiration date. Drawing parallels to Joseph's sudden elevation from prison in Egypt, Brandon encourages believers to expect sudden miraculous changes and to declare that unsaved loved ones will experience immediate spiritual turnarounds.

OVERCOMING SPIRITUAL OPPOSITION AND STAYING STEADFAST: Brandon explains that spiritual opposition frequently challenges a believer's faith just before a breakthrough occurs, using a football analogy about the difficulty of advancing at the one-yard line. He illustrates this concept by describing an incident where his daughter disrupted a church service shortly after he received a divine word about her healing. Brandon emphasizes the necessity of remaining unmoved by physical circumstances, advocating for a steadfast reliance on the Word of God and explaining that enduring affliction and the Refiner's Fire leads to greater spiritual glory.

CORRECTION OF THE PROPHETIC COMMUNITY AND FINANCIAL WARNINGS: Brandon relays a stern message from God directed at the prophetic community, condemning the practice of focusing on wealth and material gain. He announces an upcoming shakeup within this community, refusing to issue prophecies about financial investments like XRP, XLM, or the Dinar. Brandon cautions that some individuals are facing legal trouble for tax evasion driven by greed, urging a return to prioritizing the kingdom of God over cryptocurrency and reminding listeners to ensure their spiritual lamps remain full of oil. He also briefly mentions keeping watch on Israel.
rawData: [February 10, 2025]-[Every circumstance in your life has an expiration date]-[https://youtu.be/oR7iuKjs59w]-[Hey, good morning family. I just want to say thank you to all the people who came out for the Arise Conference with Sister Billie and Rick Renner. It was wonderful. We have one more day, which is Sunday, and we're having services tomorrow morning and tomorrow night at 7:00. We're excited about it; it’s the finale, and I'm believing God for a major move of His presence, a glorious outpouring of His Spirit on the last night, which is tomorrow night. It's been so exciting to see every single one of you. Thank you for driving so far to be a part of this conference. There were a lot of you who drove from all over the place, from Maine to Michigan. I talked to a man from Colorado who has been coming to all the meetings, so it's exciting to see your faces. It’s great to put a face with the name from an email and say, 'Oh, that's who you are.' It’s exciting because y’all are so kind; you email us and always try to encourage us, and you're so faithful. I think it's interesting, I have some things on my heart. Bill Gates went on *The View*. Some people sent this to me and said, 'Brandon, did you see what Bill Gates said on *The View* about the plague and all that?' I said, 'Go figure,' but he went on *The View* and told everybody that he thought there would be another plague happening within the next four years—a major one, worse than COVID—just like I told you all that they were planning something worse than COVID, like the Black Death. He went on to say all these dark things. Let me show you that little clip right here. Before COVID, you said you spent the most sleepless nights worrying about pandemics. After COVID, has that changed? And if it has, what keeps you up now? Because we all need to know. Yeah, the pandemic, sadly, was fairly predictable, and it won't be the last pandemic. The next one could be far more severe. I mean, this one killed millions; it was awful. We got the vaccine. President Trump's leadership was a factor in getting that out quickly. When I spoke to him, I said, 'Here are some other medical innovations, including a thing called an HIV cure that could be accelerated.' So, we should be more prepared for a pandemic; I'd say that's still number one. You can worry about nuclear war, AI—oh, there’s plenty to worry about—but overall, I'm an optimist. It’s up to the government to think ahead on behalf of the citizens. Regarding a pandemic, there's a lot that we should be doing that hopefully we'll get our act together before the next one comes. Overall, innovation in health, both in developing countries and the rich world, I love being part of that. I was reading, though, that you said the next pandemic you are predicting within maybe 25 years. Is that certain? Certainly, we'll have one in the next 25 years. There are even some pathogens out there that we're watching right now. So, maybe a 10% chance in the next four years. Folks, they're telling you what they're planning; it's how they're going to try to derail Trump's presidency to try to not let him do all the things he’s wanting to do. I saw the darkness of them trying—the Antichrist agenda trying to stop and derail the things that God was trying to do. Now, I believe the plague has a great opportunity to take place; maybe we can delay it, maybe we can't, but I'm telling you all it's not for us to fear. The Lord said if you get Psalm 91 deep down inside of your heart and Psalm 23—I told you all I saw a major storm coming on the East Coast; a major storm was coming and it starts in Europe. The Lord showed me a great shaking to awaken is coming. Whenever I talked to Sister Billie, she said, 'Brandon, we want something greater than a revival,' and what's greater than a revival is an awakening unto God. That's what the Lord told me: 'Brandon, I'm going to bring an awakening to the church. There's a great shaking to awaken.' So, I want you all to be encouraged that this isn't about fear for you Bible-believing, Holy Ghost-filled, on-fire-for-Jesus people. This is a time to arise and shine for the light has come and the glory of the Lord is risen upon you. This is not going to be a time for you to go, 'Oh no, Chicken Little, the sky is falling.' I do not believe that. I believe it's time for the glorious church to rise up and take their authority like we've never seen before. The Bible says that He's coming for a bride without spot or wrinkle, and we will be that glorious church. What is it going to take to get there? I was standing there getting my daughter ready for church tonight and the Lord spoke to me. I was frustrated because I was brushing her hair and helping Diana get ready because we were running late, and the Lord spoke to me. He said, 'Brandon, when are you going to shift your thinking for Megan to believe for her now?' She's healed instead of always—because He heard my heart—complaining about what I was doing. He said to me, 'When are you going to believe Me that today is the day? Why is it that your heart is always, "Well, it'll come one day; her manifestation is going to come one day"?' I believe it. He said, 'When are you going to shift it to now-faith as the substance of things hoped for and evidence of things not seen? When are you going to believe for her now, Brandon? Why not?' And then He said this to me: 'Why not tonight? Why not tonight? And if not tonight, why not tomorrow night? Why do you put off in your mind that this may happen in a couple of years?' That's what He was correcting me on. I stopped and said, 'Lord...' He said, 'When are you believing for it? When do you really believe for it? Why are you believing for years from now? Believe Me for the now.' So I want to encourage you all: there's a lot of things you've been believing for, like finances, and it may not seem like you're ever going to get out of poverty, get a good job, or that your marriage is ever going to turn around, but suddenly things change. Joseph was in prison for 14 years, but he didn't know all his circumstances were going to change in a 24-hour period and he was going to be second-in-command of all Egypt. There was a 'suddenly.' There is a time where all the trials and the things you've been going through will have an expiration date. When is your expiration date? The Lord said for your life and what you're believing for, when is that time of that miracle coming for you? If we're always believing for later—which I have been—like, 'One day, Lord, in the sweet by-and-by Megan's going to get over that.' Why not now? Mark 11:24: 'Whatsoever things you desire, when you pray, believe that you receive them, and you shall have them.' Do you understand? 'Whatever things you desire, when you pray, believe that you receive them, and you'll have them.' That's the first part of the verse. I said, 'Forgive me, Lord,' because we always try to be so spiritual; we try to act like we're faking it, saying 'I'm believing,' but are you truly believing? Are you really believing? That's what He was showing me: 'Do you really believe this?' I'm going to question you: do you really believe your unsaved loved ones are coming? How would we act if today they called you and said, 'Mom, Dad, Grandma, Grandpa, I got born again today'? Instead of 'one day they'll get saved, I'm believing before they die they'll get saved,' what if we start believing in the now? The Lord said, 'Start believing for the now.' All we see about the great shaking—I'll go back to that—I know what the Lord has shown me: there's a great shaking to awaken. I know there are major things about to take place. It's all about the people that are coming and running with the—we're ready with the catcher's mitts, ready to get the people that are coming. The shaking to awaken is for the great revival, for us to have this major outpouring of the Spirit like we had at these services. We're waiting and anticipating the manifestations of the glory, saying, 'God, let's do it tonight. God, let's see somebody get healed tonight.' Where is the glorious outpouring? Where's it at, Lord? I'm believing it's going to happen tonight. I'm believing my unsaved loved one's going to get born again today. Always have an expectation for the manifestation of what you're believing for, never losing sight of being fully persuaded that what God has promised, He's able also to perform. I believe I receive what the Lord has told me He would do, and I'm not going to get weary in well-doing. I'm going to keep my eyes focused on Him, seeking Him, staying vertical regardless of what the finances say, regardless of what my checkbook says, or what my bank statement says. I am not moved by what I see; I'm not moved by what I feel; I'm moved by what the word of God says. That's what I'm trying to tell you all. Many of you are going from paycheck to paycheck; you're barely making it and you know that everything you've earned today was spent three days ago. You're thinking, 'How in the world am I ever going to get out of this circumstance? How am I ever going to get out of this hole that I've been in?' We're so in debt that the debt is over us and the bill collectors are calling every single day. But there is a 'suddenly.' The Lord told me to tell you this today because I said, 'Lord, how do I present this?' He said, 'Tell them what you're going through right now. We're all a work in progress.' We're all believing for something today. If you're not, you should be. Believe God to do something big in your life because He's able to do exceedingly abundantly above all that you dare ask or think, according to the power that worketh through you and in you. We are His children; the spirit of man is the candle of the Lord. I believe with all my heart it's time to believe God for the impossible. You may think, 'I'm never going to get out of this financial hole,' or 'I'm always going to be at the bottom of the barrel and the barrel is on top of me,' but it's time to change that stinking thinking. It's time to think, 'My husband or my wife is going to come to Jesus.' They're going to have that supernatural visitation from the Lord in their sleep; they're going to have that supernatural Holy Ghost experience on the way home from work today. When I get home today, my wife's going to be there. You say, if your wife's a stay-at-home mom, 'She's going to have something that's going to tug at her and she'll say, "Honey, I had an experience with Jesus today."' You say, 'I've never had that before; my wife is not saved and doesn't want anything to do with Jesus.' But there's always that 'suddenly'; there's an expiration date for what you're going through. I believe with all my heart, I hear that in my spirit today to tell you: there's an expiration date for what you're going through. The Lord told me to tell you it's time to believe God for big. It's time to believe Him for big in your life today, that there will be sudden things, a sudden change. I got hope when I saw tonight. Megan had a rough night at church, but I said I'm not moved, even when she was squirming around on the back row and we had to take her out because I thought, 'Man, this is embarrassing.' The guest speaker was sitting behind us as he got there late, and I thought, 'This is a very embarrassing moment because of how Megan is acting,' but I said I'm not moved by what I see. I said, 'God, I'm believing for the now.' But see, the devil always comes to challenge your 'now' to try to knock you down right before you know that your breakthrough is right there at the door. Tomorrow is the Super Bowl, and there are a lot of times you'll see them go all the way to the end zone, and right at the one-yard line—fourth and goal for those who like football—it's when it's the hardest to make the touchdown. A lot of times you just got to get a couple of inches, but it seems to be the hardest. If you don't give up, if you keep on keeping on and keep looking—even when the devil comes immediately like he did tonight to try to knock me down and say, 'You had that word in the house, ha ha ha, Megan acted up'—I got frustrated and tired of it. I looked at her and thought, 'Wow, this is a rough night tonight.' My wife said, 'What was that all about? That was a hard night.' I said it's because he immediately comes to challenge the word of what the Lord said. He comes to try to kick you and knock you down, but if you stand up and say, 'I'm standing up on the inside, sucker. I don't care how you try to kick me in the gut and knock me down; I'm standing on the inside, and there's an expiration date to my circumstances.' I am not moved by what I see; I'm not moved by what I feel; I'm moved by what the Word says. I'm telling you tonight folks, I'm living it. You say, 'Well, Brother, you have it all together.' No, I'm living it. I'm an example of somebody who's standing by faith for something they've not seen in 20 years, but the Lord said there's an expiration date. What's your expiration date? What are you believing Him for? What are you saying in your heart, 'I'm not moved by what I see; I'm not moved by what I feel; I'm moved by what the word of God says'? He said all things are possible to him who believes. Do you believe that? I want to say with everything I have: all things are possible to him who believes. Your unsaved loved one is coming home today. Your wife's going to have a turnaround today; your husband's going to have a turnaround today. Your marriage is coming out of the hole; your marriage is going to get rekindled. You're going to fall in love with each other. In this time of love, we will not get out of love; we choose to walk in love with our unsaved loved ones no matter what we see, no matter how ugly they act. They may come in and cuss you out or do something crazy, and you go, 'Lord, I thought you told me they're coming home.' No, I'm not moved by what I see. I'm calling those things that be not as though they were today. My husband is saved, my wife is saved, my children are saved; they are healed, they are whole, they are well. Father, I thank You, Lord, that You sent Your angels to war on my behalf. Holy Spirit, I need Your help; I'm in a ditch, come and get me out. The Holy Spirit's an ever-present help in a time of need, and He pulls you out of that ditch. But it's our stinking thinking that derails us and we get down in that pity party, saying, 'Woe is me, feel sorry for me.' No, it's not always easy when you're going through it, but it's what's standing on the inside. I am not moved by what I see. I know there's a lot of you hurting inside and you may have had the worst week ever, saying 'I am so tired of being depressed or having anxiety or a fighting marriage.' But there's an expiration date. I choose to believe the expiration date is today. I want you to believe today with me. It says where two or more agree in touching anything, I'll be your two. I'll agree with you today for your unsaved loved ones and that you have expiration dates right there. Joseph had his season of great change. He surely thought, 'Am I going to be in this prison? All I did was try to honor God by not sleeping with Potiphar's wife, and she said I raped her when I didn't touch her.' He could have been up there whining, but he feared God and chose not to murmur and complain. He could have cursed God and died, but he chose to fear the Lord and interpreted a dream for Pharaoh, and lo and behold, he got out of that pit and became second-in-command. Your circumstances can change just like his did. God is no respecter of persons, and what He did for Joseph thousands of years ago, He'll do for you today. Jesus Christ is the same yesterday, today, and forever. Yet we see all these things about plagues and earthquakes in the news; we know we're in the signs of the times. I warned you about this and that, but right now the Lord is telling me to tell you He wants you to believe Him for big. Major alarm bells are going off in the spirit realm, but the Lord's coming back for a glorious church. It's time for the body of Christ to arise and shine for the light has come. We are going to be the salt and the light, and people are going to run to us and say, 'What is it that's different about you?' I've said this many times: it will be like a quarter; you'll have the dark on one side and light on the other. What do you choose to focus on? The Lord said great sobering days are coming. You can focus on the glorious church or you can focus on the darkness, the plagues, pestilence, wars, signs in the heavens, and asteroids. It's going to freak everybody out, but are you the one who is stable, saying 'I'm a King's kid. He's got me. I'm protected. I'm always in the right place at the right time. I'm never where a terrorist attack is going to be. I am where God wants me.' Be filled with and controlled by the Holy Spirit today. How hungry and desperate are you for change in your life today? I choose to believe with you for your healing. So let's take communion right now together. I just wanted to tell you there's an expiration date. There are levels of glory; He's talking to me about what it takes to get to the glory and He gave me Romans. I really want you to memorize the whole passage of Romans chapter 8. Verse 18 talks about the suffering whenever you go through the Refiner's Fire; it causes the glory to come on you. The greater the affliction, the greater the glory on your life. Glory and challenge go hand in hand. Refiner's fire and glory go hand in hand according to Romans. I choose not to let these circumstances define me. This is not who I am; this is just a place I'm moving through. Yea, though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil. Sometimes you have to walk through the valley, but you have to keep walking. Thy rod and thy staff, they comfort me. He will deliver you from the snare of the fowler, but sometimes you still have to walk through the valley. Many are the afflictions of the righteous, but the Lord said He would deliver us out of them all. When you get through that valley, it's the Refiner's Fire that causes us to go up higher. We're going to see a major outpouring of the Spirit of the Lord beyond anything we've ever seen before. Father, we just thank You for all You've done for us. We thank You for Your body that was broken for us. You were wounded for our transgressions and bruised for our iniquities; the chastisement of our peace was upon You and with Your stripes we are healed. Lord, we thank You that You suffered and died. According to Galatians, Christ has redeemed us from the curse of the law. I thank You for the 'now,' for the expiration date of it. We call healing over our bodies and we say today is our victory and deliverance. Rick Renner said, 'If you start asking the Holy Spirit for help, it’s like an old tea kettle.' It takes a little bit sometimes for the water to make that boiling sound, but if you keep on seeking Him and praying in the spirit, eventually that kettle’s going to start to whistle. So be steady and keep on keeping on. Lord, we take this body right now in the name of Jesus. Thank You, Father, that we don't have to go through this anymore. We plead the blood over our unsaved loved ones and thank You that they're saved and healed. We thank You for jobs and better jobs. We apply the blood around our house; no weapon formed against us will prosper. God has not given us a spirit of fear, but of power, and of love, and of a well-balanced mind. Now, Father, the Bible says that Satan has blinded the eyes of the unbeliever, and we take authority over those eyes right now that they would be flooded with light. I say in the name of Jesus that they have that 'suddenly' experience with the Holy Spirit right now, that they will no longer be on this path to hell but will be radically born again and ready for the coming of the Lord. I thank You that those unsaved loved ones are coming to Jesus right now as we speak. If you need Jesus, let me lead you in the sinner's prayer. Say this with me: 'Jesus, I believe You're the Son of God. I believe that You died and rose again on the third day. Jesus, I'm a sinner and I need a savior. Forgive me, Lord, and write my name in the Lamb's Book of Life. I want to make You my Lord and personal savior. Thank You, Lord, for forgiving me of my sins. I love You, Lord, and I'll serve You all the days of my life.' That's all you have to do. Tell somebody in the comment section if you just gave your heart to Jesus. We want to rejoice with you. If you don't have a Bible, email us and we'll send you one for free. Find a Bible-believing church, get baptized, and keep fanning your flame for Jesus. Don't let it go cold. Now, let's pray for your healing. Reach forth and grab a hold of His garment by faith. The woman with the issue of blood said, 'If I could touch the hem of His garment, I'll be made whole.' He said, 'Daughter, your faith has made you whole.' If her faith made her whole, your faith will make you whole. Life and death are in the power of your tongue; whatever you say out of your mouth today is what you're going to have for results tomorrow. You've got to change your stinking thinking. Start saying, 'I believe I receive my healing; my circumstances are changing today.' I hope this video blessed you. We stand with you for your finances. God said, 'Give, and it shall be given unto you: good measure, pressed down, shaken together, and running over.' Seed time and harvest never cease. Bless your pastor and those ministering to you spiritually. Help get the gospel out. People sent me a guy on YouTube saying, 'Brandon, you need to tell us how to invest our money,' and he made a video just for me. Listen, I do what the Holy Spirit tells me to do. I am led by the Spirit of the Lord. The Lord corrected me very sternly about prophetic YouTube channels that base themselves solely on being a 'genie in the bottle.' I refuse to use the gift of God inside of me like that. The Lord said you will see a great shaking in the prophetic community. He told me, 'Brandon, I'm done with that.' You must speak exactly what I say and not add anything to it. It's about going vertical with Him. Seek ye first the kingdom and all these things will be added unto you. He never said to seek money or the next XRP or XLM prophecy. I will not. It's about not seeking the Father for material gain. If you seek My face, Brandon, you can have what’s in My hand. But I refuse to be a little toddler asking for candy. Daddy has the cattle on a thousand hills; everything in His kingdom is yours already. He specifically told me to tell you all about the Dinar because many of His children are about to go to jail or prison for tax evasion. He had a heart of compassion, saying 'I don't want to see this happening.' A storm is about to happen and the devil is going to try to set you all up out of greed. I saw how the people were about crypto and the lust through all the emails; 75% were so obsessed with money. Fall in love with Jesus and He'll give you the desires of your heart. Turn your eyes upon Jesus, look full in His wonderful face, and the things of Earth will grow strangely dim in the light of His glory and grace. Nothing else matters; all the other stuff is just material. He's coming soon, and He's coming back for a people who are sold out. Is your lamp full of oil today, or are you like the five virgins who did not fill their lamps? When the bridegroom came, they weren't ready and He said, 'I don't know you.' It’s not about when it's convenient to have your lamp full. Five had it and five didn't. Who are you today? I want Him to say, 'Brandon, I look forward to these days with you.' I used to ask Him about finances, and He said, 'Don't you ever come to My throne asking like that again. Seek ye first the kingdom.' So that's where we're at. I hope this video blessed you. Watch Israel. Subscribe, click the notification bell, and give a thumbs up to help get this into the algorithm. We never ask for a dime from anyone. If someone asks for money, that is a scammer. God bless you all. Jesus loves you so much. We'll see you again soon.]
